posts.author: Prasad_G
posts.text: Introducing Trailing Stop Loss in GTT orders on Kite (Beta) — @DhanushK @siva @Arockiya_Raja As Zerodha users, we are still begging for very basic features needed for simple trading. Please understand that we are living in the AI era, yet Zerodha still does not provide many basic features , even after claiming 16 successful years. Some features available for long-term investors are not available for intraday traders. Also, when a new feature is introduced on the web app, it takes almost 6 months to arrive on the mobile app. image 984×776 59.5 KB The latest NSE active client data clearly shows…

posts.author: DhanushK
posts.text: Introducing Trailing Stop Loss in GTT orders on Kite (Beta) — Currently, GTTs are supported only on CNC, MTF, and NRML product types. Yes, this is in our pipeline. This will be added in the next phase. This is in our list of things to do. We will explore this in the near future.

posts.text: Introducing Trailing Stop Loss in GTT orders on Kite (Beta) — Trailing Stop Loss (TSL) add Buy/Sell popup window as well , so I can easily set my TSL while placing a buy order image 1072×301 19 KB Swing Trading & GTT Orders GTT: Price-Based SL, Not Just Percentage [NEEDS IMPROVEMENT] The GTT currently supports only percentage-based stop-loss and target inputs. As a swing trader, I place stop-losses based on chart structure — specifically the swing low of the setup. There is no clean way to convert that price level into an exact percentage upfront. posts.author: DhanushK
posts.text: Introducing Trailing Stop Loss in GTT orders on Kite (Beta) — We are excited to announce the launch of Trailing Stop Loss (TSL) for Good Till Triggered (GTT) orders on Kite. One of the most requested features is designed to help you protect your profits and manage risk dynamically as the market moves in your favor. Unlike a standard stop loss, which remains at a fixed price, a trailing stop loss in a GTT order automatically adjusts its trigger price. This can now be accessed on the Kite beta portal kite-beta.zerodha.com . Keep in mind that the GTTs created on kite.zerodha.com won’t appear on t…
